# CMakeLists.txt for C Algorithm Practice Project
# Generated by AI Assistant on 2026-05-09
#
# This CMake configuration builds the main executable with all source files.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.10)

project(algo_practice C)

set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD_REQUIRED True)

# Include header file paths
include_directories(${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/src)

# Collect all source files recursively
file(GLOB_RECURSE SOURCES
    src/*.c
    tests/*.c
    utils/*.c
)

# Create the main executable
add_executable(main ${SOURCES})
